withStateTransaction.signature: withStateTransaction(projectRoot: string, mutator: (state: State) => State, options?: { onCompromised?: 'abort' | 'continue' }): Promise<State>
withStateTransaction.description: Enhanced state transaction with granular error diagnostics, orphan cleanup, and configurable compromised-lock behavior.

granular-error-messages.description: withStateTransaction produces distinct error types: STATE_FILE_MISSING, STATE_PARSE_ERROR, STATE_VALIDATION_ERROR -- each with actionable remediation in the error message

orphan-tmp-cleanup.description: On transaction start, any .tmp files older than 30 seconds in the .planning directory are removed with a warning log

compromised-abort.description: When onCompromised is 'abort' (new default), a compromised lock causes the transaction to throw rather than proceed with stale state

concurrent-safety.description: Two simultaneous withStateTransaction calls on the same STATE.json never corrupt the file -- one succeeds, one retries or fails cleanly

definition.scope: Harden withStateTransaction() with granular error diagnostics, orphan .tmp file cleanup, onCompromised abort behavior, and concurrency tests.

tasks.description: Implement granular error classification in withStateTransaction
tasks.acceptance: Three distinct error types with actionable messages

tasks.description: Add orphaned .tmp file detection and cleanup
tasks.acceptance: Stale .tmp files cleaned on transaction start with warning
Compromised lock aborts transaction by default

tasks.description: Fix lock target PID update on acquisition
tasks.acceptance: PID updated correctly on every lock acquire
Tests prove two simultaneous transactions do not corrupt state

acceptance: No opaque 'Cannot mutate' errors -- all failures produce actionable diagnostics
